text.title: DR Drill Script Template Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pre-drill-comms
step.action: Announce drill to security / support / business owners. Set drill window + drill ID.

step.name: declare-and-start-clock
step.action: Simulate trigger condition. Confirm scenario id. Start clock. Page on-call.

step.name: execute-runbook-verbatim
step.action: Run each step in order. Log deviations.
step.note: Gate: If step blocks for >15min, escalate per drill plan (not real escalation).

step.name: validate-restore
step.action: Run data-integrity + smoke + sample replay. Mark validation_pass.

step.name: score-and-close
step.action: Compute RTO / RPO achieved. Compare to targets. Announce drill end.

step.name: publish-post-mortem
step.action: Within 7 days, publish post-mortem + gap tickets + sign-off.
